rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ROBERT A. NAIFY LIVING TRUST DATED FEBRUARY 8, 1991
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Acela Corteses First Amended Petition, Action, And Claims Against Him As An Individual Only
rulings.Rulings: Motion to Dismiss is denied, pursuant to the declaration of Acela Cortese. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, Ocotober 25, 2017.
